home.title: Turning the browser into a playground.
home.description: Three frontend experiments grown from real needs: cross-device control, peer-to-peer transfer, and smarter short links.

remote.title: Phone Remote
remote.description: Scan a QR code and turn your phone into a slide remote, laser pointer, and touchpad.

drop.title: Web AirDrop
drop.description: Join a room and exchange text and files instantly with WebRTC.

links.title: Short Links & Thumbnails
links.description: Create short links, QR codes, rich previews, and page thumbnails.

remote.title: Let your phone take over this screen.
remote.description: The desktop creates a disposable room. Scan to control slides, scroll content, and move a laser pointer. Every command is relayed in real time over WebSocket.
remote.desktopHint: Keep this page open on your desktop

one.title: One phone. Two screens.
one.body: After scanning the QR code, phone and desktop join the same temporary room. Commands arrive instantly without a refresh.

two.title: Every interaction is an event.
two.body: Left and right change slides, up and down scroll, while the touchpad streams normalized pointer coordinates. The server only handles rooms and relays.

three.title: A remote without an app install.
three.body: The QR code is the invitation. With a modern browser and internet access, your phone and desktop do not need to share the same Wi-Fi.

controller.title: Control desktop
controller.leaveOpen: Keep this page open while controlling

errors.ALIAS_TAKEN: This custom code is already in use. Try another one.
errors.CREATE_LINK_FAILED: Could not create the short link. Please try again.
errors.IMAGE_REQUIRED: Please choose an image to upload.
errors.IMAGE_TOO_LARGE: Image must be 5 MB or smaller.
errors.INVALID_ALIAS: Custom code must be 3–24 characters and can only use letters, numbers, - or _.
errors.INVALID_IMAGE_TYPE: Only JPG, PNG, WebP, and GIF images are supported.
errors.PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: Password must be at least 4 characters.
errors.PREVIEW_FETCH_FAILED: Could not read the page preview.
errors.RATE_LIMITED: You are creating links too quickly. Please try again later.
errors.REDIRECT_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: This URL redirects too many times.
errors.UNREADABLE_PREVIEW: This URL does not provide readable page information.
errors.UNSAFE_INTERNAL_URL: Internal or private URLs are not allowed.
errors.UNKNOWN_ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.UNSUPPORTED_URL_PROTOCOL: Only HTTP and HTTPS URLs are supported.
errors.URL_CONTAINS_CREDENTIALS: URLs cannot contain username or password.

placeholder.dropDescription: The next phase will add peer-to-peer text and file transfer with WebRTC.
placeholder.linksDescription: Supabase is wired up. Next comes the short-link schema, redirects, and thumbnail pipeline.
